description: Coregistration showcase assets for the national 512 re-grid: (1) before/after inter-frame flicker GIFs and (2) static edge-overlay panels derived from them. Both contrast raw M1 grid-snap vs mutual-information (M2) inter-frame coregistration.

flicker_gifs.source_data: /data/_national_dryrun spectral_precoreg (raw M1 frames from the 5-tile dry-run; zero-PU re-process, no re-fetch)
flicker_gifs.method: imint.coregistration.estimate_mi_offset — mutual information maximised over a continuous sub-pixel shift (Powell); shift applied with the Fourier subpixel_shift

files.44063896_f2_before.gif / _after.gif: 0.77 px -> 0.02 px (phase correlation had amplified this frame to 1.84 px)

edge_overlays.source_data: the committed flicker GIFs above (frame 0 = reference, frame 1 = target, B04, 360x360) — no external data, zero DES processing units
edge_overlays.method: per-frame Sobel-magnitude edge mask (threshold = 85th percentile), painted on the DES forest-green card background using document-palette colours — grey (#9ca3af) = reference edges / brick-red (#c0392b) = target edges / mint (#cff8e4, the ba-after accent) = coincident (aligned); nearest-neighbour 2x upscale

files.43983928_f1_edge_before.png / _edge_afte: 0.79 px -> 0.00 px; edge bands collapse to mint after MI
files.44003936_f0_edge_before.png / _edge_afte: 0.39 px -> 0.00 px; autumn vs growing-season — dominant grey/brick-red is seasonal content difference, not misregistration
